venue.name: Audi Field
venue.notes: Shared with Washington Spirit (NWSL); located in Southwest Washington, D.C.

head_coach.name: René Weiler
head_coach.background: Swiss manager (born 1973); previously managed clubs in Switzerland, Germany, Belgium, Egypt, and Japan since 2009; led Servette FC to 2024 Swiss Cup title. Replaced Troy Lesesne in July 2025. 2026 is his first full season at the helm.

roster.name: Tai Baribo
roster.notes: Team's leading scorer (6G across all comps as of mid-May 2026)

roster.name: Andre Dozzell

verification_notes: Roster fully verified from official dcunited.com/roster page. Player names with diacritics (João Peglow) preserved. Head coach René Weiler confirmed via multiple sources (ESPN, MLSSoccer.com, Washington Post). Record (4-5-5, 17 pts, 5th East, 13th overall MLS) sourced from Wikipedia 2026 season article through May 17, 2026 — verify before publishing recaps. Assistant coaching staff not available — official roster page omits coaches and Wikipedia did not list assistants; recommend manual verification or contact club. Recent games are inferred from Wikipedia narrative summaries — exact dates were not provided and should be confirmed via mlssoccer.com or ESPN schedule before being cited in published recaps. Upcoming games could not be confirmed (ESPN schedule URL returned 404 in fetch). Note one Wikipedia paragraph conflicts with the 2026 standings: it referenced '15th place and 30th overall' and 'did not qualify for 2025 playoffs' — that appears to be older 2024 season context bleeding through, NOT current 2026 status. Used the 2026 season article numbers as authoritative.
